data.content: Plan revision required: the rename scope is incomplete for the current repo. Existing assertions in src/lib/__tests__/settings-scan.test.ts and src/lib/__tests__/settings-coverage.test.ts still expect provider "OpenAI", so the stated lint/typecheck/test acceptance will fail unless those tests are included in scope. The plan also references src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity.test.ts, which does not exist in this repo; it should either name the actual identity test coverage file(s) or explicitly call for creating a new test file. Please revise the plan to cover the full Codex rename/test impact before implementation.
